subject: [PATCH v3 1/4] sunrpc: route to a populated pool in svc_pool_for_cpu()

2026-06-29.patch_summary: This patch modifies the `svc_pool_for_cpu` function to route RPC transports to a populated pool instead of one that may be empty due to uneven thread distribution across pools. This ensures that incoming connections are always serviced, even if some pools have no threads assigned to them. The change trades off NUMA locality for guaranteed serviceability of transports.
